[32m succeeded in 394ms:[0m
   1: """ECL B 窶・bank spend/no-spend ast-guard (Codex HIGH-4 superset, ﾂｧI4).
   2: 
   3: Issue 003 (``loop/20260708-m13-b-code-impl/issues/003-spend-ast-guard.md``) of
   4: the FROZEN ADR ``.steering/20260707-m13-b-impl-design/design-final.md`` (ﾂｧI4
   5: spend/no-spend boundary, ﾂｧB5.2 binding prohibition). This is a **non-test
   6: helper module** (leading-underscore, no ``test_`` prefix), so pytest never
   7: collects it and no guard here ever self-scans its own definitions 窶・the same
   8: convention as ``_measurement_guard.py`` (the shared ECL v1 measurement-line
   9: guard this module extends).
  10: 
  11: The bank driver (``bank.py``/``bank_fixtures.py``, Issue 001/002) is a
  12: *construction* apparatus that records **raw rows only**
  13: (:class:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank.BankLlmCallRecord`); Codex
  14: HIGH-4 identified that a raw-row-only contract alone leaves an implicit
  15: aggregation escape hatch 窶・``Counter`` / ``len(set(zone for ...))`` / a
  16: ``numpy``/``pandas`` one-liner can synthesize an ``H(zone|ctx)``-shaped proxy
  17: statistic from those raw rows without ever importing the banned ``evidence.*``
  18: measurement machinery the shared v1 guard already closes. This module adds
  19: five independent guards that, together with the reused v1 guard, make that
  20: escape hatch a machine-checked non-surface:
  21: 
  22: 1. :func:`assert_no_aggregation_surface` 窶・bans ``math.log`` /
  23:    ``collections.Counter`` / ``itertools.groupby`` / a whole-module
  24:    ``numpy``/``pandas``/``scipy``/``statistics`` import, **and** a
  25:    ``set``/``{...}`` construct built over a zone-valued expression (the
  26:    precise "set over zones" reading from the ADR: a legitimate
  27:    ``{r.system_prompt for r in records}`` prompt-dedup set is never banned,
  28:    only a set/comprehension whose element expression names a ``*zone*``
  29:    attribute or identifier).
  30: 2. :func:`assert_no_adaptive_topup` 窶・``m_draws``/``k_contexts`` parameters
  31:    must default to a frozen int literal (or a module-level frozen int
  32:    constant reference, e.g. ``m_draws: int = BANK_M_GOLDEN``), and no
  33:    ``while`` loop exists anywhere in the scanned module (the structural
  34:    marker of a runtime top-up branch; the bake-out loop is ``for``-only by
  35:    construction).
  36: 3. :func:`assert_bank_annotation_opaque` 窶・an identifier-ban extension
  37:    (mirrors ``_measurement_guard``'s substring-ban style) closing
  38:    ``diversity``/``entropy``/``distinct``-shaped identifiers a B-side test
  39:    could otherwise assert against.
  40: 4. :func:`assert_bank_import_allowlist` 窶・a **closed** import allowlist for
  41:    the bank modules (denylist-substring belt-and-suspenders on top), rather
  42:    than an open-ended denylist that a new banned import could slip past.
  43: 5. :func:`assert_llm_call_cap` 窶・a runtime (not AST) helper: fail-fast when
  44:    an observed call count exceeds ``2 * m_draws * k_contexts`` (the
  45:    ``.codex/budget.json``-style cost-ceiling precedent), the construction
  46:    shakedown's own spend cap.
  47: 
  48: Free-text docstrings are never substring-scanned (mirrors
  49: ``_measurement_guard``'s "a scope-guard note that merely mentions a banned
  50: token does not self-trip" convention) 窶・every guard here walks only
  51: ``ast.Name``/``ast.Attribute``/``ast.arg``/``ast.FunctionDef``/``ast.ClassDef``/
  52: ``ast.Import``/``ast.ImportFrom``/``ast.Set``/``ast.SetComp``/``ast.Call``
  53: nodes, never a bare ``ast.Constant`` string body.
  54: """
  55: 
  56: from __future__ import annotations
  57: 
  58: import ast
  59: from typing import Final
  60: 
  61: from tests.test_integration._measurement_guard import assert_no_measurement_surface_v1
  62: 
  63: __all__ = [
  64:     "assert_bank_annotation_opaque",
  65:     "assert_bank_import_allowlist",
  66:     "assert_bank_no_measurement_surface",
  67:     "assert_llm_call_cap",
  68:     "assert_no_adaptive_topup",
  69:     "assert_no_aggregation_surface",
  70: ]
  71: 
  72: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
  73: # 1. Aggregation-surface ban (Codex HIGH-4)
  74: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
  75: 
  76: _BANNED_FULL_MODULES: Final[tuple[str, ...]] = (
  77:     "numpy",
  78:     "pandas",
  79:     "scipy",
  80:     "statistics",
  81: )
  82: """Whole-module ban: no legitimate bank use exists for any of these, so the
  83: entire module import is forbidden regardless of which symbol is pulled in."""
  84: 
  85: _BANNED_FROM_IMPORT: Final[dict[str, frozenset[str]]] = {
  86:     "math": frozenset({"log"}),
  87:     "collections": frozenset({"Counter"}),
  88:     "itertools": frozenset({"groupby"}),
  89: }
  90: """``from <module> import <name>`` bans targeted at the specific aggregation
  91: symbol, not the whole (otherwise-benign) module 窶・``collections.abc`` /
  92: ``itertools.chain`` stay legal."""
  93: 
  94: _BANNED_ATTR_ACCESS: Final[dict[str, frozenset[str]]] = _BANNED_FROM_IMPORT
  95: """``<module>.<attr>`` attribute-access ban 窶・covers the ``import math`` +
  96: ``math.log(...)`` usage form a from-import ban alone would miss."""
  97: 
  98: _ZONE_SUBSTRING: Final[str] = "zone"
  99: 
 100: 
 101: def _full_import_names(node: ast.AST) -> list[str]:
 102:     """Every dotted module path a single ``import`` statement pulls in."""
 103:     if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
 104:         return [alias.name for alias in node.names]
 105:     if isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module is not None and node.level == 0:
 106:         return [node.module]
 107:     return []
 108: 
 109: 
 110: def _guard_full_module_ban(node: ast.AST) -> None:
 111:     for name in _full_import_names(node):
 112:         assert not any(
 113:             name == banned or name.startswith(f"{banned}.")
 114:             for banned in _BANNED_FULL_MODULES
 115:         ), name
 116: 
 117: 
 118: def _guard_targeted_from_import(node: ast.AST) -> None:
 119:     if not isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) or node.module is None:
 120:         return
 121:     banned_names = _BANNED_FROM_IMPORT.get(node.module)
 122:     if banned_names is None:
 123:         return
 124:     for alias in node.names:
 125:         assert alias.name not in banned_names, f"{node.module}.{alias.name}"
 126: 
 127: 
 128: def _guard_attr_access(node: ast.AST) -> None:
 129:     """``import math`` + ``math.log(...)`` (or ``collections.Counter`` /
 130:     ``itertools.groupby``) attribute-access usage form."""
 131:     if not isinstance(node, ast.Attribute) or not isinstance(node.value, ast.Name):
 132:         return
 133:     banned_attrs = _BANNED_ATTR_ACCESS.get(node.value.id)
 134:     if banned_attrs is None:
 135:         return
 136:     assert node.attr not in banned_attrs, f"{node.value.id}.{node.attr}"
 137: 
 138: 
 139: def _references_zone(node: ast.AST) -> bool:
 140:     """``True`` if any ``Name``/``Attribute`` under ``node`` names a zone field."""
 141:     for sub in ast.walk(node):
 142:         if isinstance(sub, ast.Attribute) and _ZONE_SUBSTRING in sub.attr.lower():
 143:             return True
 144:         if isinstance(sub, ast.Name) and _ZONE_SUBSTRING in sub.id.lower():
 145:             return True
 146:     return False
 147: 
 148: 
 149: def _guard_zone_set_aggregation(node: ast.AST) -> None:
 150:     """A ``set``/``{...}`` construct over a zone-valued expression (an
 151:     ``H(zone|ctx)`` proxy, Codex HIGH-4) 窶・never a bare ``set``/``{...}`` over
 152:     a non-zone field (e.g. a ``system_prompt`` dedup set stays legal)."""
 153:     if isinstance(node, (ast.Set, ast.SetComp)):
 154:         assert not _references_zone(node), "set literal/comprehension over a zone field"
 155:     if (
 156:         isinstance(node, ast.Call)
 157:         and isinstance(node.func, ast.Name)
 158:         and node.func.id == "set"
 159:     ):
 160:         for arg in node.args:
 161:             assert not _references_zone(arg), "set(...) call over a zone field"
 162: 
 163: 
 164: def assert_no_aggregation_surface(tree: ast.Module) -> None:
 165:     """Codex HIGH-4: ban the implicit-aggregation ("H 繧ゅ←縺・) escape hatches.
 166: 
 167:     ``math.log`` / ``collections.Counter`` / ``itertools.groupby`` / a whole
 168:     ``numpy``/``pandas``/``scipy``/``statistics`` import, and a
 169:     ``set``/``{...}`` construct built over a zone-valued expression. A set
 170:     over a non-zone field (e.g. prompt dedup) is never flagged 窶・only the
 171:     zone-aggregation reading of "set over zones" (ﾂｧI4).
 172:     """
 173:     for node in ast.walk(tree):
 174:         _guard_full_module_ban(node)
 175:         _guard_targeted_from_import(node)
 176:         _guard_attr_access(node)
 177:         _guard_zone_set_aggregation(node)
 178: 
 179: 
 180: def assert_bank_no_measurement_surface(tree: ast.Module, *, scan_strings: bool) -> None:
 181:     """Superset guard for a bank apparatus file: the shared v1 3-hole guard
 182:     (evidence/spdm/runningness/floor/landscape/verdict/divergence, reused
 183:     unmodified) plus the Codex HIGH-4 aggregation-surface ban (ﾂｧI4)."""
 184:     assert_no_measurement_surface_v1(tree, scan_strings=scan_strings)
 185:     assert_no_aggregation_surface(tree)
 186: 
 187: 
 188: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 189: # 2. No-adaptive-topup guard
 190: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 191: 
 192: _FROZEN_PARAM_NAMES: Final[frozenset[str]] = frozenset({"m_draws", "k_contexts"})
 193: 
 194: 
 195: def _module_level_int_constants(tree: ast.Module) -> dict[str, int]:
 196:     """Module-level ``NAME: int = <literal>`` / ``NAME = <literal>`` constants."""
 197:     constants: dict[str, int] = {}
 198:     for node in tree.body:
 199:         target: ast.expr | None = None
 200:         value: ast.expr | None = None
 201:         if isinstance(node, ast.AnnAssign) and isinstance(node.target, ast.Name):
 202:             target, value = node.target, node.value
 203:         elif (
 204:             isinstance(node, ast.Assign)
 205:             and len(node.targets) == 1
 206:             and isinstance(node.targets[0], ast.Name)
 207:         ):
 208:             target, value = node.targets[0], node.value
 209:         if target is None or value is None:
 210:             continue
 211:         if isinstance(value, ast.Constant) and isinstance(value.value, int):
 212:             constants[target.id] = value.value
 213:     return constants
 214: 
 215: 
 216: def assert_no_adaptive_topup(tree: ast.Module) -> None:
 217:     """I3-G3: M/K are frozen literals, never grown at runtime off an
 218:     annotation read (ﾂｧI4 ``adaptive top-up 遖∵ｭ｢``).
 219: 
 220:     Two independent checks: (a) no ``while`` loop anywhere in the module 窶・    the bake-out M-loop is ``for``-only by construction (ﾂｧI1.4), so a
 221:     ``while`` is the structural marker of a runtime top-up branch; (b) every
 222:     ``m_draws``/``k_contexts`` parameter default is either a bare int literal
 223:     or a reference to a module-level frozen int constant (e.g.
 224:     ``m_draws: int = BANK_M_GOLDEN``) 窶・never a ``Call``/``Attribute`` that
 225:     could resolve a value dynamically (e.g. from an annotation file).
 226:     """
 227:     for node in ast.walk(tree):
 228:         assert not isinstance(node, ast.While), "adaptive top-up marker: a while loop"
 229: 
 230:     frozen = _module_level_int_constants(tree)
 231:     for node in ast.walk(tree):
 232:         if not isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef)):
 233:             continue
 234:         positional = [*node.args.posonlyargs, *node.args.args]
 235:         defaults = node.args.defaults
 236:         paired = zip(
 237:             positional[len(positional) - len(defaults) :], defaults, strict=True
 238:         )
 239:         for arg, default in paired:
 240:             if arg.arg not in _FROZEN_PARAM_NAMES:
 241:                 continue
 242:             if isinstance(default, ast.Constant) and isinstance(default.value, int):
 243:                 continue
 244:             if isinstance(default, ast.Name) and default.id in frozen:
 245:                 continue
 246:             msg = (
 247:                 f"{node.name}({arg.arg}=...) default is not a frozen int literal "
 248:                 "(adaptive top-up risk)"
 249:             )
 250:             raise AssertionError(msg)
 251: 
 252: 
 253: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 254: # 3. Annotation-opaque identifier guard
 255: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 256: 
 257: _BANK_BANNED_IDENTIFIER_SUB: Final[tuple[str, ...]] = (
 258:     "diversity",
 259:     "entropy",
 260:     "distinct",
 261: )
 262: _BANK_BANNED_IDENTIFIER_EXACT: Final[frozenset[str]] = frozenset(
 263:     {
 264:         "h",
 265:         "h_zone",
 266:         "hzone",
 267:         "shannon_entropy",
 268:         "zone_count",
 269:         "count_zones",
 270:         "n_distinct",
 271:     }
 272: )
 273: 
 274: 
 275: def _guard_bank_identifiers(node: ast.AST) -> None:
 276:     names: list[str] = []
 277:     if isinstance(node, ast.Name) and isinstance(node.ctx, ast.Store):
 278:         names.append(node.id)
 279:     elif isinstance(node, ast.AnnAssign) and isinstance(node.target, ast.Name):
 280:         names.append(node.target.id)
 281:     elif isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef, ast.ClassDef)):
 282:         names.append(node.name)
 283:     elif isinstance(node, ast.arg):
 284:         names.append(node.arg)
 285:     for name in names:
 286:         low = name.lower()
 287:         assert low not in _BANK_BANNED_IDENTIFIER_EXACT, name
 288:         assert not any(tok in low for tok in _BANK_BANNED_IDENTIFIER_SUB), name
 289: 
 290: 
 291: def assert_bank_annotation_opaque(tree: ast.Module) -> None:
 292:     """I3-G4: the bank module + B-side test never compute/assert
 293:     count/diversity/H/distinct-zone (ﾂｧI4 ``annotation 縺ｯ B 蛛ｴ縺ｧ opaque``)."""
 294:     for node in ast.walk(tree):
 295:         _guard_bank_identifiers(node)
 296: 
 297: 
 298: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 299: # 4. Closed import allowlist
 300: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 301: 
 302: _ALLOWED_STDLIB_PREFIXES: Final[tuple[str, ...]] = (
 303:     "__future__",
 304:     "os",
 305:     "contextlib",
 306:     "dataclasses",
 307:     "typing",
 308:     "collections.abc",
 309:     "json",
 310:     "datetime",
 311: )
 312: _ALLOWED_ERRE_PREFIXES: Final[tuple[str, ...]] = (
 313:     "erre_sandbox.cognition",
 314:     "erre_sandbox.inference",
 315:     "erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.loop",
 316:     "erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.live",
 317:     "erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank_fixtures",
 318:     "erre_sandbox.memory",
 319:     "erre_sandbox.schemas",
 320: )
 321: """``erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.live`` is an *exact* boundary-safe
 322: prefix (``full == prefix or full.startswith(prefix + ".")``) 窶・it never
 323: accidentally admits ``erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.live_v1`` (a sibling
 324: module, not a sub-attribute of ``live``)."""
 325: 
 326: _DENIED_SUBSTRINGS: Final[tuple[str, ...]] = (
 327:     "evidence",
 328:     "d0_substrate",
 329:     "es2_replay",
 330:     "memory_recomp_conformance",
 331:     "runningness",
 332:     "landscape_divergence",
 333: )
 334: """Belt-and-suspenders denylist (ﾂｧI4): even if a future allowlist edit were
 335: mistaken, none of these measurement-line module fragments may appear in a
 336: bank-module import path."""
 337: 
 338: 
 339: def _matches_prefix(full: str, prefixes: tuple[str, ...]) -> bool:
 340:     return any(full == prefix or full.startswith(f"{prefix}.") for prefix in prefixes)
 341: 
 342: 
 343: def _import_full_paths(node: ast.AST) -> list[str]:
 344:     """Every dotted ``module.name`` path a single import statement admits."""
 345:     if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
 346:         return [alias.name for alias in node.names]
 347:     if isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom):
 348:         if node.level != 0 or node.module is None:
 349:             return ["<relative-import>"]
 350:         return [f"{node.module}.{alias.name}" for alias in node.names]
 351:     return []
 352: 
 353: 
 354: def assert_bank_import_allowlist(tree: ast.Module) -> None:
 355:     """I3-G5: bank module import 竓・closed allowlist 竏ｧ 竏ｩ denylist = 竏・(ﾂｧI4)."""
 356:     for node in ast.walk(tree):
 357:         if not isinstance(node, (ast.Import, ast.ImportFrom)):
 358:             continue
 359:         for full in _import_full_paths(node):
 360:             assert not any(token in full for token in _DENIED_SUBSTRINGS), full
 361:             allowed = _matches_prefix(
 362:                 full, _ALLOWED_STDLIB_PREFIXES
 363:             ) or _matches_prefix(full, _ALLOWED_ERRE_PREFIXES)
 364:             assert allowed, f"import not in bank allowlist: {full}"
 365: 
 366: 
 367: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 368: # 5. Runtime LLM call-cap helper
 369: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 370: 
 371: 
 372: def assert_llm_call_cap(actual_calls: int, m_draws: int, k_contexts: int) -> None:
 373:     """Construction shakedown call cap (ﾂｧI4, ``.codex/budget.json``-style cost
 374:     ceiling): ``actual_calls`` must never exceed ``2 * m_draws * k_contexts``
 375:     (T_on + T_off, each drawing ``m_draws`` times, over ``k_contexts``).
 376:     Fail-fast (:class:`AssertionError`) the instant the cap is exceeded 窶・    powered/live spend authorization is out of this construction guard's
 377:     scope (C-proper).
 378:     """
 379:     cap = 2 * m_draws * k_contexts
 380:     assert actual_calls <= cap, f"actual_calls={actual_calls} exceeds cap={cap} (2*M*K)"

   1: """ECL B 窶・Issue 005 tests: annotation side-file schema + bank golden replay.
   2: 
   3: Issue ``loop/20260708-m13-b-code-impl/issues/005-annotation-golden.md`` of the
   4: FROZEN ADR ``.steering/20260707-m13-b-impl-design/design-final.md`` (ﾂｧI4 raw-row
   5: annotation / ﾂｧI5 bank golden = small committed replay fixture, cross-platform).
   6: Ollama-free throughout (D-10 mock-only) 窶・this module never opens a live
   7: Ollama connection; ``scripts.ecl_bank_capture`` is exercised directly.
   8: 
   9: Scope guard (ﾂｧI9/ﾂｧI4, mirrors ``test_ecl_bank_driver.py`` /
  10: ``test_ecl_bank_fixtures.py``): this module tests *construction*, never
  11: measurement. It never asserts ``H(zone|ctx)`` / distinct-zone counts /
  12: diversity / divergence over the annotation rows 窶・only schema, byte-identity,
  13: and completion.
  14: """
  15: 
  16: from __future__ import annotations
  17: 
  18: import json
  19: import subprocess
  20: import sys
  21: from pathlib import Path
  22: 
  23: from scripts.ecl_bank_capture import (

  30:     BANK_ANNOTATION_SCHEMA_VERSION,
  31:     BANK_K_GOLDEN,
  32:     BANK_M_GOLDEN,
  33: )
  34: 
  35: _REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
  36: _GOLDEN_DIR = _REPO_ROOT / "experiments" / "20260708-m13-b-bank" / "artifacts"
  37: _ANNOTATION_ROW_KEYS = frozenset(
  38:     {
  39:         "frozen_ctx_id",
  40:         "condition",
  41:         "mc_index",
  42:         "pre_bias_destination_zone",
  43:         "resolved_from",
  44:     }
  45: )
  46: 
  47: 
  48: def _read_committed() -> tuple[dict[str, object], str, str]:
  49:     manifest = json.loads((_GOLDEN_DIR / "manifest.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  50:     records_text = (_GOLDEN_DIR / "bank_records.jsonl").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
  51:     annotation_text = (_GOLDEN_DIR / "bank_annotation.jsonl").read_text(
  52:         encoding="utf-8"
  53:     )
  54:     return manifest, records_text, annotation_text
  55: 
  56: 
  57: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
  58: # I5-G1 窶・annotation side-file schema (closed set exactly, opaque, no aggregate)
  59: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
  60: 
  61: 
  62: def test_bank_annotation_side_file_schema() -> None:
  63:     """Every committed annotation row's key set is the ﾂｧI4 closed set exactly.
  64: 
  65:     No extra field (no ``H`` / count / diversity / divergence key), and the
  66:     manifest carries the annotation schema version 窶・never a per-row field
  67:     (the schema version is a bundle-level pin, not part of the raw-row shape)."""
  68:     manifest, _records_text, annotation_text = _read_committed()
  69:     rows = [json.loads(line) for line in annotation_text.splitlines() if line.strip()]
  70:     assert rows, "committed annotation side-file must be non-empty"
  71:     for row in rows:
  72:         assert set(row) == _ANNOTATION_ROW_KEYS, row
  73:         assert row["condition"] in ("on", "off")
  74:         assert isinstance(row["mc_index"], int)
  75:         assert row["mc_index"] >= 0
  76:         assert row["resolved_from"] == "pre_bias_direct_parse"
  77: 
  78:     assert manifest["annotation_schema_version"] == BANK_ANNOTATION_SCHEMA_VERSION
  79: 
  80: 
  81: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
  82: # I5-G2 窶・committed bank records replay to a byte-identical bundle (Ollama-free)
  83: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
  84: 
  85: 
  86: async def test_bank_golden_replay_checksum() -> None:
  87:     """The committed bank golden replays from records alone 窶・no live LLM.
  88: 
  89:     ``scripts.ecl_bank_capture.verify`` reconstructs the K frozen contexts from
  90:     the committed ``bank_records.jsonl`` alone (no provenance pass, no chat
  91:     call) and re-drives the bake-out M-loop through a **replay**-mode
  92:     ``BankRecordReplayClient`` 窶・this is the reproduction contract itself
  93:     (``inner_invocations == 0``), not merely a schema check."""
  94:     ok = await verify(_GOLDEN_DIR)
  95:     assert ok is True
  96: 
  97: 
  98: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
  99: # I5-G3 窶・categorical byte stability (zone-pick) + 6-decimal float quantisation
 100: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 101: 
 102: 
 103: def test_bank_golden_categorical_byte_stable() -> None:
 104:     """Zone-pick is categorical (a ``Zone`` enum string) 窶・byte-stable by
 105:     construction; sampling floats are 6-decimal quantised (cross-platform
 106:     ``libm``-drift absorber, ``feedback_golden_crossplatform_float_drift``)."""
 107:     _manifest, records_text, _annotation_text = _read_committed()
 108:     rows = [json.loads(line) for line in records_text.splitlines() if line.strip()]
 109:     assert rows
 110: 
 111:     for row in rows:
 112:         zone = row["pre_bias_destination_zone"]
 113:         assert zone is None or isinstance(zone, str)
 114:         sampling = row["sampling"]
 115:         for key in ("temperature", "top_p", "repeat_penalty"):
 116:             value = sampling[key]
 117:             assert isinstance(value, (int, float))
 118:             assert round(float(value), 6) == value, (
 119:                 f"{key} not 6-decimal quantised: {value!r}"
 120:             )
 121: 
 122:     # Re-parsing + re-canonicalising every committed row (public round-trip via
 123:     # scripts.ecl_bank_capture's record (de)serialisers) reproduces the exact
 124:     # committed bytes 窶・the categorical/quantised fields round-trip with no
 125:     # drift. Covered end-to-end (record 竊・replay 竊・re-render byte identity) by
 126:     # ``test_bank_golden_replay_checksum``; this test isolates the field-level
 127:     # invariant only.
 128: 
 129: 
 130: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 131: # I5-G4 窶・mock construction verification run (K x M x 2, call cap respected)
 132: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 133: 
 134: 
 135: async def test_bank_construction_run_mock() -> None:
 136:     """A fresh mock construction run completes Kﾃ柚ﾃ・ without exception and
 137:     respects the ﾂｧI4 ``2ﾂｷMﾂｷK`` call cap 窶・Ollama-free (D-10)."""
 138:     rendered = await capture(seed=0, m_draws=BANK_M_GOLDEN, k_contexts=BANK_K_GOLDEN)
 139:     assert set(rendered) == {
 140:         "bank_records.jsonl",
 141:         "bank_annotation.jsonl",
 142:         "manifest.json",
 143:     }
 144: 
 145:     manifest = json.loads(rendered["manifest.json"])
 146:     assert manifest["bank_golden_manifest_version"] == BANK_GOLDEN_MANIFEST_VERSION
 147:     assert manifest["call_cap"]["actual"] == 2 * BANK_M_GOLDEN * BANK_K_GOLDEN
 148:     assert manifest["call_cap"]["actual"] <= manifest["call_cap"]["cap"]
 149: 
 150:     record_rows = [
 151:         json.loads(line)
 152:         for line in rendered["bank_records.jsonl"].splitlines()
 153:         if line.strip()
 154:     ]
 155:     assert len(record_rows) == 2 * BANK_M_GOLDEN * BANK_K_GOLDEN
 156: 
 157:     annotation_rows = [
 158:         json.loads(line)
 159:         for line in rendered["bank_annotation.jsonl"].splitlines()
 160:         if line.strip()
 161:     ]
 162:     assert len(annotation_rows) == len(record_rows)
 163:     for row in annotation_rows:
 164:         assert set(row) == _ANNOTATION_ROW_KEYS
 165: 
 166: 
 167: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 168: # I5-G5 窶・repro.sh exits 0 (subprocess, one-command Ollama-free reproduction)
 169: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 170: 
 171: 
 172: def test_bank_golden_repro_script_exits_zero() -> None:
 173:     """``repro.sh``'s underlying CLI invocation exits 0 (Ollama-free)."""
 174:     result = subprocess.run(  # noqa: S603 - fixed argv, no shell, test-only
 175:         [

   1: #!/usr/bin/env python
   2: """ECL B 窶・bank golden capture/verify CLI (mock-only, Ollama-free, D-10).
   3: 
   4: Issue 005 (``loop/20260708-m13-b-code-impl/issues/005-annotation-golden.md``) of
   5: the FROZEN ADR ``.steering/20260707-m13-b-impl-design/design-final.md`` (ﾂｧI4
   6: raw-row-only annotation / ﾂｧI5 bank golden = small committed replay fixture,
   7: cross-platform). D-10 (grill-goals.md) binds the whole 蜿榊ｾｩ bank Loop slice to
   8: **mock-only** 窶・this script never opens a live Ollama connection and never
   9: imports ``OllamaChatClient``; every ``chat()`` call in this module is served by
  10: a small deterministic in-process mock.
  11: 
  12: ``--capture`` drives, for :data:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank.BANK_K_GOLDEN`
  13: frozen contexts:
  14: 
  15: 1. Issue 001's :func:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank_fixtures.run_provenance_pass`
  16:    (one full-cycle pass per condition, mock inner chat, canonical builders 窶・the
  17:    frozen ``(system_prompt, user_prompt, sampling_on, sampling_off)`` bundle) to
  18:    build the K :class:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank_fixtures.FrozenContext`.
  19: 2. Issue 002's :func:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank.run_bank_mloop`
  20:    (bake-out, mock inner chat, zone bias off) over the K frozen contexts,
  21:    ``m_draws=BANK_M_GOLDEN`` ﾃ・2 conditions each 窶・the ﾂｧI4 ``2ﾂｷMﾂｷK`` call cap is
  22:    asserted (fail-fast) against the record-mode client's ``inner_invocations``.
  23: 
  24: It then writes the **opaque raw-row annotation side file** (ﾂｧI4:
  25: ``{frozen_ctx_id, condition, mc_index, pre_bias_destination_zone,
  26: resolved_from}`` 窶・the closed set exactly, never an aggregate) alongside the
  27: bank-records replay fixture and a manifest, all serialised through
  28: ``handoff.canonical_dumps`` (6-decimal float quantisation, the cross-platform
  29: ``libm``-drift absorber, ``feedback_golden_crossplatform_float_drift``) and
  30: ``handoff.capture_env_pins``.
  31: 
  32: ``--verify`` is the companion **Ollama-free** replay-verify (I5-G2/I5-G3): it
  33: rebuilds the K frozen contexts *from the committed bank records themselves*
  34: (every record already carries its context's ``system_prompt`` / ``user_prompt``
  35: / resolved sampling 窶・no provenance pass, and therefore no chat call at all, is
  36: needed to reconstruct them) and re-drives :func:`run_bank_mloop` through a
  37: :class:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank.BankRecordReplayClient` built in
  38: **replay** mode (:meth:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank.BankRecordReplayClient.for_replay`),
  39: asserting ``inner_invocations == 0`` and a byte-identical re-render of every
  40: artifact (reusing the committed ``env_pins`` so a fresh machine's package/
  41: interpreter snapshot can never drift the manifest bytes).
  42: 
  43: Scope guard (ﾂｧI9/ﾂｧI4, binding, mirrors ``bank.py`` / ``bank_fixtures.py``). This
  44: is a **construction** apparatus, **NOT a measurement line**. It computes no
  45: ``H(zone|ctx)`` / diversity / divergence / floor / verdict over the annotation
  46: rows, and imports no ``evidence`` / ``spdm`` / ``runningness`` machinery, no
  47: ``math.log``, no ``collections.Counter``, no ``set()`` aggregation over zones,
  48: no ``itertools.groupby``, and no ``numpy`` / ``pandas`` / ``scipy`` /
  49: ``statistics``. ``bank.py`` / ``bank_fixtures.py`` / ``handoff.py`` / ``loop.py``
  50: are imported here, never modified.
  51: """
  52: 
  53: from __future__ import annotations
  54: 
  55: import argparse
  56: import asyncio
  57: import hashlib
  58: import json
  59: import sys
  60: from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  61: from datetime import UTC, datetime
  62: from pathlib import Path
  63: from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any, Final, cast
  64: 
  65: import httpx
  66: 
  67: from erre_sandbox.inference.ollama_adapter import ChatResponse
  68: from erre_sandbox.inference.sampling import ResolvedSampling
  69: from erre_sandbox.integration.embodied import handoff
  70: from erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank import (

  72:     BANK_K_GOLDEN,

  80: from erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank_fixtures import (

  83:     build_competing_cue_substrate,

  87: from erre_sandbox.schemas import Zone

  90:     from collections.abc import Sequence
  91: 
  92:     from erre_sandbox.inference.ollama_adapter import ChatMessage
  93:     from erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank import BankCondition
  94: 
  95: _REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
  96: _DEFAULT_OUT_DIR = _REPO_ROOT / "experiments" / "20260708-m13-b-bank" / "artifacts"
  97: _DEFAULT_RUN_ID = "ecl-bank-golden"
  98: _FIXED_CLOCK: Final[datetime] = datetime(2026, 1, 1, 12, 0, 0, tzinfo=UTC)
  99: 
 100: BANK_GOLDEN_MANIFEST_VERSION: Final[str] = "ecl-bank-golden-1"
 101: """This CLI's own manifest-shape version (independent of
 102: :data:`~erre_sandbox.integration.embodied.bank.BANK_SCHEMA_VERSION` and
 103: ``handoff.MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION``)."""
 104: 
 105: _RESOLVED_FROM_TAG: Final[str] = "pre_bias_direct_parse"
 106: """The annotation ``resolved_from`` provenance tag (ﾂｧI4/``BankAnnotationRow``
 107: docstring): every row's zone label is a direct pre-bias
 108: ``parse_llm_plan(...).destination_zone`` read, never a resolver decision."""
 109: 
 110: 
 111: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 112: # Ollama-free mocks (D-10 窶・mock-only, no live Ollama import anywhere here)
 113: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 114: 
 115: 
 116: def _mock_embedding() -> EmbeddingClient:
 117:     """A constant-vector embedding 窶・deterministic and Ollama-free."""
 118:     vec = [0.01] * EmbeddingClient.DEFAULT_DIM
 119: 
 120:     def handler(request: httpx.Request) -> httpx.Response:
 121:         body = json.loads(request.content)
 122:         inputs = body.get("input") or []
 123:         count = len(inputs) if isinstance(inputs, list) else 1
 124:         return httpx.Response(httpx.codes.OK, json={"embeddings": [vec] * count})
 125: 
 126:     return EmbeddingClient(
 127:         client=httpx.AsyncClient(
 128:             base_url=EmbeddingClient.DEFAULT_ENDPOINT,
 129:             transport=httpx.MockTransport(handler),
 130:         )
 131:     )
 132: 
 133: 
 134: def _store_factory() -> MemoryStore:
 135:     return MemoryStore(db_path=":memory:")
 136: 
 137: 
 138: def _plan_json(zone: str | None) -> str:
 139:     zone_field = f'"{zone}"' if zone is not None else "null"
 140:     return (
 141:         "{"
 142:         '"thought": "which zone calls to me?", '
 143:         '"utterance": "bank mock draw", '
 144:         f'"destination_zone": {zone_field}, '
 145:         '"animation": "walk"'
 146:         "}"
 147:     )
 148: 
 149: 
 150: _PROVENANCE_PLAN_JSON: Final[str] = _plan_json(Zone.STUDY.value)
 151: """Fixed provenance-pass response content 窶・the destination this call parses to
 152: is never read downstream (only the rendered prompt/sampling the canonical
 153: builders produced matters, ﾂｧI1.3), so a single fixed content keeps the
 154: provenance pass's own record deterministic without adding meaning."""
 155: 
 156: _MLOOP_PLAN_CONTENTS: Final[tuple[str, ...]] = (
 157:     _plan_json(Zone.STUDY.value),
 158:     _plan_json(Zone.GARDEN.value),
 159:     _plan_json(None),
 160: )
 161: """Bake-out M-loop mock content cycle 窶・deterministic, round-robin. Includes one
 162: unparseable-destination draw (``destination_zone: null``) so the golden fixture
 163: exercises :class:`BankLlmCallRecord`'s ``pre_bias_destination_zone is None``
 164: branch (ﾂｧI5) alongside the two Z_comp zones, all schema-only 窶・no meaning is
 165: attached to which zone "wins" (construction, not measurement)."""
 166: 
 167: 
 168: @dataclass
 169: class _ProvenanceMockChat:
 170:     """Ollama-free inner chat for the provenance pass 窶・one fixed response."""
 171: 
 172:     content: str = _PROVENANCE_PLAN_JSON
 173:     calls: int = 0
 174: 
 175:     async def chat(
 176:         self,
 177:         messages: Sequence[ChatMessage],
 178:         *,
 179:         sampling: ResolvedSampling,
 180:         model: str | None = None,
 181:         options: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 182:         think: bool | None = None,
 183:     ) -> ChatResponse:
 184:         self.calls += 1
 185:         return ChatResponse(
 186:             content=self.content, model="bank-mock", eval_count=1, total_duration_ms=0.0
 187:         )
 188: 
 189: 
 190: @dataclass
 191: class _MloopMockChat:
 192:     """Ollama-free inner chat for the bake-out M-loop 窶・deterministic round-robin."""
 193: 
 194:     contents: tuple[str, ...] = _MLOOP_PLAN_CONTENTS
 195:     calls: int = field(default=0)
 196: 
 197:     async def chat(
 198:         self,
 199:         messages: Sequence[ChatMessage],
 200:         *,
 201:         sampling: ResolvedSampling,
 202:         model: str | None = None,
 203:         options: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 204:         think: bool | None = None,
 205:     ) -> ChatResponse:
 206:         content = self.contents[self.calls % len(self.contents)]
 207:         self.calls += 1
 208:         return ChatResponse(
 209:             content=content, model="bank-mock", eval_count=1, total_duration_ms=0.0
 210:         )
 211: 
 212: 
 213: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 214: # Serialisation (own to this script 窶・bank.py never grows a bulk (de)serialiser)
 215: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 216: 
 217: 
 218: def _bank_record_to_dict(record: BankLlmCallRecord) -> dict[str, Any]:
 219:     return {
 220:         "frozen_ctx_id": record.frozen_ctx_id,
 221:         "condition": record.condition,
 222:         "mc_index": record.mc_index,
 223:         "system_prompt": record.system_prompt,
 224:         "user_prompt": record.user_prompt,
 225:         "sampling": record.sampling.model_dump(),
 226:         "raw_response": record.raw_response,
 227:         "pre_bias_destination_zone": (
 228:             record.pre_bias_destination_zone.value
 229:             if record.pre_bias_destination_zone is not None
 230:             else None
 231:         ),
 232:     }
 233: 
 234: 
 235: def _bank_record_from_dict(data: dict[str, Any]) -> BankLlmCallRecord:
 236:     condition = data["condition"]
 237:     if condition not in ("on", "off"):
 238:         msg = f"invalid bank condition: {condition!r}"
 239:         raise ValueError(msg)
 240:     zone_value = data["pre_bias_destination_zone"]
 241:     return BankLlmCallRecord(
 242:         frozen_ctx_id=data["frozen_ctx_id"],
 243:         condition=cast("BankCondition", condition),
 244:         mc_index=data["mc_index"],
 245:         system_prompt=data["system_prompt"],
 246:         user_prompt=data["user_prompt"],
 247:         sampling=ResolvedSampling.model_validate(data["sampling"]),
 248:         raw_response=data["raw_response"],
 249:         pre_bias_destination_zone=(
 250:             Zone(zone_value) if zone_value is not None else None
 251:         ),
 252:     )
 253: 
 254: 
 255: def _annotation_row_to_dict(row: BankAnnotationRow) -> dict[str, Any]:
 256:     return {
 257:         "frozen_ctx_id": row.frozen_ctx_id,
 258:         "condition": row.condition,
 259:         "mc_index": row.mc_index,
 260:         "pre_bias_destination_zone": (
 261:             row.pre_bias_destination_zone.value
 262:             if row.pre_bias_destination_zone is not None
 263:             else None
 264:         ),
 265:         "resolved_from": row.resolved_from,
 266:     }
 267: 
 268: 
 269: def _annotation_row_from_dict(data: dict[str, Any]) -> BankAnnotationRow:
 270:     condition = data["condition"]
 271:     if condition not in ("on", "off"):
 272:         msg = f"invalid bank condition: {condition!r}"
 273:         raise ValueError(msg)
 274:     zone_value = data["pre_bias_destination_zone"]
 275:     return BankAnnotationRow(
 276:         frozen_ctx_id=data["frozen_ctx_id"],
 277:         condition=cast("BankCondition", condition),
 278:         mc_index=data["mc_index"],
 279:         pre_bias_destination_zone=(
 280:             Zone(zone_value) if zone_value is not None else None
 281:         ),
 282:         resolved_from=data["resolved_from"],
 283:     )
 284: 
 285: 
 286: def _records_to_jsonl(records: Sequence[BankLlmCallRecord]) -> str:
 287:     return "".join(
 288:         f"{handoff.canonical_dumps(_bank_record_to_dict(r))}\n" for r in records
 289:     )
 290: 
 291: 
 292: def _records_from_jsonl(text: str) -> tuple[BankLlmCallRecord, ...]:
 293:     return tuple(
 294:         _bank_record_from_dict(json.loads(line))
 295:         for line in text.splitlines()
 296:         if line.strip()
 297:     )
 298: 
 299: 
 300: def _annotation_to_jsonl(rows: Sequence[BankAnnotationRow]) -> str:
 301:     return "".join(
 302:         f"{handoff.canonical_dumps(_annotation_row_to_dict(r))}\n" for r in rows
 303:     )
 304: 
 305: 
 306: def _annotation_from_jsonl(text: str) -> tuple[BankAnnotationRow, ...]:
 307:     return tuple(
 308:         _annotation_row_from_dict(json.loads(line))
 309:         for line in text.splitlines()
 310:         if line.strip()
 311:     )
 312: 
 313: 
 314: def _bank_checksum(records: Sequence[BankLlmCallRecord]) -> str:
 315:     """A sha256 integrity witness over the canonical-serialised record sequence.
 316: 
 317:     Mirrors ``loop.ecl_trace_checksum``'s shape (canonical-join-then-hash) but is
 318:     computed here directly 窶・this module never imports ``loop``'s checksum
 319:     helper, which operates on ``EclTraceRow``, not :class:`BankLlmCallRecord`.
 320:     An integrity/reproducibility witness over already-collected raw rows, never
 321:     a statistic derived *from* the rows' content (ﾂｧI4).
 322:     """
 323:     canonical = "\n".join(
 324:         handoff.canonical_dumps(_bank_record_to_dict(r)) for r in records
 325:     )
 326:     return hashlib.sha256(canonical.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
 327: 
 328: 
 329: def _sha256(text: str) -> str:
 330:     return hashlib.sha256(text.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
 331: 
 332: 
 333: def _frozen_contexts_from_records(
 334:     records: Sequence[BankLlmCallRecord],
 335: ) -> tuple[FrozenContext, ...]:
 336:     """Rebuild the K frozen contexts from the bank records alone (no chat call).
 337: 
 338:     Every :class:`BankLlmCallRecord` already carries its context's
 339:     ``system_prompt`` / ``user_prompt`` / resolved ``sampling`` 窶・the ``"on"``
 340:     condition rows supply ``sampling_on``, the ``"off"`` rows supply
 341:     ``sampling_off`` (ﾂｧI3.3: the two conditions' prompts are byte-identical, so
 342:     either supplies ``system_prompt``/``user_prompt``). This lets
 343:     ``--verify`` re-drive :func:`run_bank_mloop` **without** re-running the
 344:     provenance pass (and therefore without a single chat call) 窶・the I5-G2
 345:     "committed bank records 縺ｮ縺ｿ replay" contract.
 346:     """
 347:     by_id: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
 348:     for record in records:
 349:         entry = by_id.setdefault(record.frozen_ctx_id, {})
 350:         entry.setdefault("system_prompt", record.system_prompt)
 351:         entry.setdefault("user_prompt", record.user_prompt)
 352:         if record.condition == "on":
 353:             entry["sampling_on"] = record.sampling
 354:         else:
 355:             entry["sampling_off"] = record.sampling
 356:     contexts = [
 357:         FrozenContext(
 358:             frozen_ctx_id=ctx_id,
 359:             system_prompt=entry["system_prompt"],
 360:             user_prompt=entry["user_prompt"],
 361:             sampling_on=entry["sampling_on"],
 362:             sampling_off=entry["sampling_off"],
 363:         )
 364:         for ctx_id, entry in by_id.items()
 365:     ]
 366:     return tuple(sorted(contexts, key=lambda c: c.frozen_ctx_id))
 367: 
 368: 
 369: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 370: # manifest + rendering
 371: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 372: 
 373: 
 374: def _build_manifest(
 375:     *,
 376:     records: Sequence[BankLlmCallRecord],
 377:     records_jsonl: str,
 378:     annotation_jsonl: str,
 379:     m_draws: int,
 380:     k_contexts: int,
 381:     seed: int,
 382:     base_ts: datetime,
 383:     context_ids: Sequence[str],
 384:     env_pins: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 385: ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 386:     manifest: dict[str, Any] = {
 387:         "bank_golden_manifest_version": BANK_GOLDEN_MANIFEST_VERSION,
 388:         "annotation_schema_version": BANK_ANNOTATION_SCHEMA_VERSION,
 389:         "run": {
 390:             "run_id": _DEFAULT_RUN_ID,
 391:             "m_draws": m_draws,
 392:             "k_contexts": k_contexts,
 393:             "seed": seed,
 394:             "base_ts": base_ts.isoformat(),
 395:             "retrieval_now": base_ts.isoformat(),
 396:             "context_ids": list(context_ids),
 397:         },
 398:         "env_pins": env_pins if env_pins is not None else handoff.capture_env_pins(),
 399:         "artifacts": {
 400:             "bank_records.jsonl": {"sha256": _sha256(records_jsonl)},
 401:             "bank_annotation.jsonl": {"sha256": _sha256(annotation_jsonl)},
 402:         },
 403:         "bank_checksum": _bank_checksum(records),
 404:         # Administrative call-count bookkeeping (mirrors handoff.build_manifest's
 405:         # ``world_tick_count``/``cognition_ticks`` pattern) 窶・a total row count,
 406:         # never a per-zone aggregate (ﾂｧI4).
 407:         "call_cap": {"actual": len(records), "cap": 2 * m_draws * k_contexts},
 408:     }
 409:     return attach_bank_observables(manifest)
 410: 
 411: 
 412: def render_bank_golden(
 413:     *,
 414:     records: Sequence[BankLlmCallRecord],
 415:     annotation_rows: Sequence[BankAnnotationRow],
 416:     m_draws: int,
 417:     k_contexts: int,
 418:     seed: int,
 419:     base_ts: datetime,
 420:     context_ids: Sequence[str],
 421:     env_pins: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 422: ) -> dict[str, str]:
 423:     """Render the three bank-golden artifacts as ``{filename: text}`` (pure)."""
 424:     records_jsonl = _records_to_jsonl(records)
 425:     annotation_jsonl = _annotation_to_jsonl(annotation_rows)
 426:     manifest = _build_manifest(
 427:         records=records,
 428:         records_jsonl=records_jsonl,
 429:         annotation_jsonl=annotation_jsonl,
 430:         m_draws=m_draws,
 431:         k_contexts=k_contexts,
 432:         seed=seed,
 433:         base_ts=base_ts,
 434:         context_ids=context_ids,
 435:         env_pins=env_pins,
 436:     )
 437:     return {
 438:         "bank_records.jsonl": records_jsonl,
 439:         "bank_annotation.jsonl": annotation_jsonl,
 440:         "manifest.json": handoff.canonical_dumps(manifest) + "\n",
 441:     }
 442: 
 443: 
 444: def _write(out_dir: Path, rendered: dict[str, str]) -> None:
 445:     out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 446:     for filename, text in rendered.items():
 447:         (out_dir / filename).write_text(text, encoding="utf-8", newline="\n")
 448: 
 449: 
 450: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 451: # capture 窶・mock construction verification run (I5-G4)
 452: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 453: 
 454: 
 455: async def _build_frozen_contexts(
 456:     *, k: int, clock: datetime
 457: ) -> tuple[FrozenContext, ...]:
 458:     """Build K frozen contexts via K independent mock provenance passes."""
 459:     contexts: list[FrozenContext] = []
 460:     for i in range(k):
 461:         substrate = build_competing_cue_substrate(context_id=f"bank-golden-ctx-{i}")
 462:         embedding = _mock_embedding()
 463:         try:
 464:             frozen = await run_provenance_pass(
 465:                 substrate=substrate,
 466:                 inner_chat=_ProvenanceMockChat(),
 467:                 store_factory=_store_factory,
 468:                 embedding=embedding,
 469:                 run_id=f"bank-golden-provenance-{i}",
 470:                 retrieval_now=clock,
 471:                 base_ts=clock,
 472:                 lambda_ctx=BANK_LAMBDA_CTX[0],
 473:                 seed=i,
 474:             )
 475:         finally:
 476:             await embedding.close()
 477:         contexts.append(frozen)
 478:     return tuple(contexts)
 479: 
 480: 
 481: async def capture(
 482:     *,
 483:     seed: int = 0,
 484:     m_draws: int = BANK_M_GOLDEN,
 485:     k_contexts: int = BANK_K_GOLDEN,
 486: ) -> dict[str, str]:
 487:     """Drive one mock bank-golden construction run and render the artifacts.
 488: 
 489:     Ollama-free throughout (D-10): the provenance pass and the bake-out M-loop
 490:     each get their own deterministic in-process mock chat client. Asserts the
 491:     ﾂｧI4 ``2ﾂｷMﾂｷK`` call cap against the M-loop record-mode client's
 492:     ``inner_invocations`` (fail-fast on overrun).
 493:     """
 494:     frozen_contexts = await _build_frozen_contexts(k=k_contexts, clock=_FIXED_CLOCK)
 495:     context_ids = [ctx.frozen_ctx_id for ctx in frozen_contexts]
 496: 
 497:     llm_client = BankRecordReplayClient.for_record(_MloopMockChat())
 498:     records = await _run_bank_mloop(
 499:         llm=llm_client, frozen_contexts=frozen_contexts, m_draws=m_draws
 500:     )
 501: 
 502:     cap = 2 * m_draws * k_contexts
 503:     actual = llm_client.inner_invocations
 504:     if actual > cap:
 505:         msg = f"[bank-capture] M-loop call cap exceeded: {actual} > {cap} (ﾂｧI4)"
 506:         raise RuntimeError(msg)
 507: 
 508:     annotation_rows = tuple(
 509:         BankAnnotationRow(
 510:             frozen_ctx_id=record.frozen_ctx_id,
 511:             condition=record.condition,
 512:             mc_index=record.mc_index,
 513:             pre_bias_destination_zone=record.pre_bias_destination_zone,
 514:             resolved_from=_RESOLVED_FROM_TAG,
 515:         )
 516:         for record in records
 517:     )
 518: 
 519:     return render_bank_golden(
 520:         records=records,
 521:         annotation_rows=annotation_rows,
 522:         m_draws=m_draws,
 523:         k_contexts=k_contexts,
 524:         seed=seed,
 525:         base_ts=_FIXED_CLOCK,
 526:         context_ids=context_ids,
 527:     )
 528: 
 529: 
 530: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 531: # verify 窶・Ollama-free committed-bundle replay-verify (I5-G2/I5-G3)
 532: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 533: 
 534: 
 535: async def verify(artifact_dir: Path) -> bool:
 536:     """Ollama-free replay-verify of a committed bank-golden artifact bundle.
 537: 
 538:     Rebuilds the K frozen contexts from the committed bank records alone (no
 539:     provenance pass, no chat call), re-drives :func:`run_bank_mloop` through a
 540:     **replay**-mode :class:`BankRecordReplayClient`, and asserts
 541:     ``inner_invocations == 0`` plus byte-identical re-renders of every artifact
 542:     (committed ``env_pins``/``run`` block reused, never a fresh snapshot).
 543:     """
 544:     manifest_text = (artifact_dir / "manifest.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 545:     manifest = json.loads(manifest_text)
 546:     records_text = (artifact_dir / "bank_records.jsonl").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 547:     annotation_text = (artifact_dir / "bank_annotation.jsonl").read_text(
 548:         encoding="utf-8"
 549:     )
 550: 
 551:     committed_records = _records_from_jsonl(records_text)
 552:     committed_annotation = _annotation_from_jsonl(annotation_text)
 553:     frozen_contexts = _frozen_contexts_from_records(committed_records)
 554: 
 555:     run_config = manifest["run"]
 556:     m_draws = int(run_config["m_draws"])
 557:     k_contexts = int(run_config["k_contexts"])
 558: 
 559:     ok = True
 560:     replay_client = BankRecordReplayClient.for_replay(committed_records)
 561:     replayed = await _run_bank_mloop(
 562:         llm=replay_client, frozen_contexts=frozen_contexts, m_draws=m_draws
 563:     )
 564: 
 565:     if replay_client.inner_invocations != 0:
 566:         ok = False
 567:         print(
 568:             f"[verify] FAIL replay touched a live LLM "
 569:             f"({replay_client.inner_invocations} calls)"
 570:         )
 571:     replayed_jsonl = _records_to_jsonl(replayed)
 572:     if replayed_jsonl != records_text:
 573:         ok = False
 574:         print("[verify] FAIL bank_records.jsonl byte mismatch on replay")
 575:     else:
 576:         print(f"[verify] OK bank_checksum {_bank_checksum(replayed)}")
 577: 
 578:     rendered = render_bank_golden(
 579:         records=replayed,
 580:         annotation_rows=committed_annotation,
 581:         m_draws=m_draws,
 582:         k_contexts=k_contexts,
 583:         seed=int(run_config["seed"]),
 584:         base_ts=datetime.fromisoformat(run_config["base_ts"]),
 585:         context_ids=list(run_config["context_ids"]),
 586:         env_pins=manifest["env_pins"],
 587:     )
 588: 
 589:     for name, committed_text in (
 590:         ("bank_records.jsonl", records_text),
 591:         ("bank_annotation.jsonl", annotation_text),
 592:     ):
 593:         expected_sha = manifest["artifacts"][name]["sha256"]
 594:         actual_sha = _sha256(rendered[name])
 595:         if actual_sha != expected_sha:
 596:             ok = False
 597:             print(f"[verify] FAIL {name} sha256 {actual_sha} != {expected_sha}")
 598:         elif rendered[name] != committed_text:  # pragma: no cover - defensive
 599:             ok = False
 600:             print(f"[verify] FAIL {name} byte mismatch despite matching sha256")
 601:         else:
 602:             print(f"[verify] OK {name} byte-identical")
 603: 
 604:     if rendered["manifest.json"] != manifest_text:
 605:         ok = False
 606:         print("[verify] FAIL manifest.json byte mismatch on re-render")
 607:     else:
 608:         print("[verify] OK manifest.json byte-identical re-render")
 609: 
 610:     print("[verify] BANK GOLDEN OK" if ok else "[verify] BANK GOLDEN MISMATCH")
 611:     return ok
 612: 
 613: 
 614: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 615: # CLI
 616: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 617: 
 618: 
 619: def main(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> int:
 620:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
 621:         description="ECL B bank golden capture/verify (mock-only)"
 622:     )
 623:     group = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
 624:     group.add_argument(
 625:         "--capture",
 626:         action="store_true",
 627:         help="drive one mock bank construction run and write the golden artifacts",
 628:     )
 629:     group.add_argument(
 630:         "--verify",
 631:         action="store_true",
 632:         help="Ollama-free replay-verify a committed bank-golden artifact bundle",
 633:     )
 634:     parser.add_argument("--out-dir", type=Path, default=_DEFAULT_OUT_DIR)
 635:     parser.add_argument("--artifact-dir", type=Path, default=_DEFAULT_OUT_DIR)
 636:     parser.add_argument("--seed", type=int, default=0)
 637:     parser.add_argument("--m-draws", type=int, default=BANK_M_GOLDEN)
 638:     parser.add_argument("--k-contexts", type=int, default=BANK_K_GOLDEN)
 639:     args = parser.parse_args(argv)
 640: 
 641:     if args.verify:
 642:         ok = asyncio.run(verify(args.artifact_dir))
 643:         return 0 if ok else 1
 644: 
 645:     rendered = asyncio.run(
 646:         capture(seed=args.seed, m_draws=args.m_draws, k_contexts=args.k_contexts)
 647:     )
 648:     _write(args.out_dir, rendered)
 649:     print(f"[capture] wrote {len(rendered)} artifacts to {args.out_dir}")
 650:     return 0
 651: 
 652: 
 653: if __name__ == "__main__":
 654:     sys.exit(main())

  51: def _plan_json(destination_zone: str | None) -> str:
  52:     zone_field = f'"{destination_zone}"' if destination_zone is not None else "null"

  55:         '"thought": "which zone calls to me?", '

  71:         frozen_ctx_id=ctx_id,
  72:         system_prompt=f"system-prompt-{ctx_id}",
  73:         user_prompt=f"user-prompt-{ctx_id}",
  74:         sampling_on=_sampling(temp_on),
  75:         sampling_off=_sampling(temp_off),
  76:     )
  77: 
  78: 
  79: @dataclass
  80: class _CyclingChat:
  81:     """Ollama-free chat client: re-serves ``contents`` round-robin, records calls."""
  82: 
  83:     contents: tuple[str, ...]
  84:     calls: list[dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  85: 
  86:     async def chat(
  87:         self,
  88:         messages: Sequence[ChatMessage],
  89:         *,
  90:         sampling: ResolvedSampling,
  91:         model: str | None = None,
  92:         options: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
  93:         think: bool | None = None,
  94:     ) -> ChatResponse:
  95:         content = self.contents[len(self.calls) % len(self.contents)]
  96:         self.calls.append(
  97:             {
  98:                 "messages": tuple(messages),
  99:                 "sampling": sampling,
 100:                 "model": model,
 101:                 "options": options,
 102:                 "think": think,
 103:                 "zone_bias_env": os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR),
 104:             }
 105:         )
 106:         return ChatResponse(
 107:             content=content, model="qwen3:8b", eval_count=1, total_duration_ms=0.0
 108:         )
 109: 
 110: 
 111: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 112: # I2-G1 窶・pre-bias readout = parse_llm_plan(raw).destination_zone
 113: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 114: 
 115: 
 116: async def test_bank_mloop_pre_bias_readout() -> None:
 117:     """``pre_bias_destination_zone`` matches a direct ``parse_llm_plan`` read,
 118:     including the ``None`` case (unparseable / no destination), for every draw."""
 119:     contents = (
 120:         _plan_json("study"),
 121:         _plan_json("garden"),
 122:         _plan_json(None),
 123:         "not json at all",
 124:     )
 125:     chat = _CyclingChat(contents=contents)
 126:     ctx = _frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-0")
 127: 
 128:     records = await run_bank_mloop(llm=chat, frozen_contexts=(ctx,), m_draws=4)
 129: 
 130:     assert len(records) == 8  # 4 draws x 2 conditions
 131:     for record in records:
 132:         # ``_CyclingChat`` selects content by global call count mod len(contents);
 133:         # each condition's mc_index range restarts the same content sequence
 134:         # (4 draws == len(contents)), so mc_index alone predicts the content.
 135:         expected_content = contents[record.mc_index % len(contents)]
 136:         expected_plan = parse_llm_plan(expected_content)
 137:         expected_zone = (
 138:             expected_plan.destination_zone if expected_plan is not None else None
 139:         )
 140:         assert record.raw_response == expected_content
 141:         assert record.pre_bias_destination_zone == expected_zone
 142:     # Concretely: the four content slots exercise study / garden / None / unparseable.
 143:     on_records = sorted(
 144:         (r for r in records if r.condition == "on"), key=lambda r: r.mc_index
 145:     )
 146:     assert [r.pre_bias_destination_zone for r in on_records] == [
 147:         Zone.STUDY,
 148:         Zone.GARDEN,
 149:         None,
 150:         None,
 151:     ]
 152: 
 153: 
 154: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 155: # I2-G2 窶・BankLlmCallRecord 8-field closed set, no EclDecisionRecord
 156: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 157: 
 158: 
 159: def test_bank_llm_call_record_schema() -> None:
 160:     """``BankLlmCallRecord`` is exactly the ﾂｧI5 8-field closed set, and
 161:     ``bank.py`` never imports/constructs ``loop.EclDecisionRecord``."""
 162:     field_names = {f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(BankLlmCallRecord)}
 163:     assert field_names == {
 164:         "frozen_ctx_id",
 165:         "condition",
 166:         "mc_index",
 167:         "system_prompt",
 168:         "user_prompt",
 169:         "sampling",
 170:         "raw_response",
 171:         "pre_bias_destination_zone",
 172:     }
 173:     assert dataclasses.is_dataclass(BankLlmCallRecord)
 174:     assert BankLlmCallRecord.__dataclass_params__.frozen is True  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
 175: 
 176:     src = _BANK_SRC.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 177:     tree = ast.parse(src)
 178:     for node in ast.walk(tree):
 179:         if isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom):
 180:             for alias in node.names:
 181:                 assert alias.name != "EclDecisionRecord", (
 182:                     "bank.py must not import loop.EclDecisionRecord "
 183:                     "(Codex 莠句ｮ溯ｪ､隱・HIGH-2)"
 184:                 )
 185:         if isinstance(node, ast.Name):
 186:             assert node.id != "EclDecisionRecord"
 187:         if isinstance(node, ast.Attribute):
 188:             assert node.attr != "EclDecisionRecord"
 189: 
 190: 
 191: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 192: # I2-G3 窶・mc_index 0..M-1 per (ctx, condition), total-order sorted
 193: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 194: 
 195: 
 196: async def test_bank_record_m_mc_index() -> None:
 197:     """Each ``(ctx, condition)`` yields ``m_draws`` records labelled
 198:     ``mc_index`` 0..M-1, and the returned tuple is already sorted by
 199:     :func:`bank_sort_key`."""
 200:     m_draws = 3
 201:     contexts = (_frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-b"), _frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-a"))
 202:     chat = _CyclingChat(contents=(_plan_json("study"),))
 203: 
 204:     records = await run_bank_mloop(llm=chat, frozen_contexts=contexts, m_draws=m_draws)
 205: 
 206:     assert len(records) == len(contexts) * 2 * m_draws
 207:     for ctx in contexts:
 208:         for condition in ("on", "off"):
 209:             subset = [
 210:                 r
 211:                 for r in records
 212:                 if r.frozen_ctx_id == ctx.frozen_ctx_id and r.condition == condition
 213:             ]
 214:             assert [r.mc_index for r in subset] == list(range(m_draws))
 215: 
 216:     order_slots = bank_order_slots(contexts)
 217:     assert records == tuple(
 218:         sorted(records, key=lambda r: bank_sort_key(r, order_slots))
 219:     )
 220:     # bank-ctx-a sorts before bank-ctx-b (order_slot rank), even though
 221:     # bank-ctx-b was listed first in ``contexts``.
 222:     assert order_slots["bank-ctx-a"] < order_slots["bank-ctx-b"]
 223:     assert records[0].frozen_ctx_id == "bank-ctx-a"
 224: 
 225: 
 226: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 227: # I2-G4 窶・record -> replay roundtrip, inner_invocations == 0, byte match
 228: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 229: 
 230: 
 231: async def test_bank_replay_roundtrip() -> None:
 232:     """Record Kﾃ柚ﾃ・ via a record-mode :class:`BankRecordReplayClient`, then
 233:     replay the same drive from the recorded tuple: identical records,
 234:     ``inner_invocations == 0``."""
 235:     contexts = (_frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-0"), _frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-1"))
 236:     m_draws = 2
 237:     contents = (_plan_json("study"), _plan_json("garden"), _plan_json(None))
 238:     record_client = BankRecordReplayClient.for_record(_CyclingChat(contents=contents))
 239: 
 240:     recorded = await run_bank_mloop(
 241:         llm=record_client, frozen_contexts=contexts, m_draws=m_draws
 242:     )
 243:     assert len(recorded) == len(contexts) * 2 * m_draws
 244:     assert record_client.is_replay is False
 245:     assert record_client.inner_invocations == len(recorded)
 246: 
 247:     replay_client = BankRecordReplayClient.for_replay(recorded)
 248:     replayed = await run_bank_mloop(
 249:         llm=replay_client, frozen_contexts=contexts, m_draws=m_draws
 250:     )
 251: 
 252:     assert replay_client.is_replay is True
 253:     assert replay_client.inner_invocations == 0
 254:     assert replayed == recorded
 255: 
 256: 
 257: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 258: # I2-G5 窶・ERRE_ZONE_BIAS_P pinned to "0" for the drive, restored after
 259: # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
 260: 
 261: 
 262: async def test_bank_zone_bias_pinned_off() -> None:
 263:     """``run_bank_mloop`` pins ``ERRE_ZONE_BIAS_P=0`` for its whole drive
 264:     (every ``chat()`` call observes ``"0"``) and restores the prior hostile
 265:     value afterward."""
 266:     prior = os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR)
 267:     os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = "1.0"
 268:     try:
 269:         chat = _CyclingChat(contents=(_plan_json("study"),))
 270:         ctx = _frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-0")
 271: 
 272:         await run_bank_mloop(llm=chat, frozen_contexts=(ctx,), m_draws=2)
 273: 
 274:         assert len(chat.calls) == 4
 275:         assert all(call["zone_bias_env"] == "0" for call in chat.calls)
 276:         assert os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR) == "1.0"
 277:     finally:
 278:         if prior is None:
 279:             os.environ.pop(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR, None)
 280:         else:
 281:             os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = prior
 282: 
 283: 
 284: async def test_bank_zone_bias_restored_on_exception() -> None:
 285:     """The pin restores the prior env var even if a ``chat()`` call raises."""
 286: 
 287:     @dataclass
 288:     class _RaisingChat:
 289:         async def chat(self, *_args: Any, **_kwargs: Any) -> ChatResponse:
 290:             raise RuntimeError("boom")
 291: 
 292:     prior = os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR)
 293:     os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = "0.5"
 294:     try:
 295:         ctx = _frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-0")
 296:         with contextlib.suppress(RuntimeError):
 297:             await run_bank_mloop(llm=_RaisingChat(), frozen_contexts=(ctx,), m_draws=1)
 298:         assert os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR) == "0.5"
 299:     finally:
 300:         if prior is None:
 301:             os.environ.pop(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR, None)
 302:         else:
 303:             os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = prior
 304:

 311: async def test_bank_mloop_prompt_frozen_across_draws() -> None:
 312:     """Every draw of a ``(ctx, condition)`` pair sees the byte-identical
 313:     ``(system_prompt, user_prompt)`` 窶・only ``sampling`` differs by condition,
 314:     never by draw (ﾂｧI2.4 frozen-string invariant)."""
 315:     ctx = _frozen_ctx("bank-ctx-0")
 316:     chat = _CyclingChat(contents=(_plan_json("study"),))
 317: 
 318:     records = await run_bank_mloop(
 319:         llm=chat, frozen_contexts=(ctx,), m_draws=BANK_M_GOLDEN
 320:     )

 322:     assert len({r.system_prompt for r in records}) == 1
 323:     assert len({r.user_prompt for r in records}) == 1
 324:     assert next(iter({r.system_prompt for r in records})) == ctx.system_prompt
 325:     on_samplings = {r.sampling for r in records if r.condition == "on"}
 326:     off_samplings = {r.sampling for r in records if r.condition == "off"}
 327:     assert on_samplings == {ctx.sampling_on}
 328:     assert off_samplings == {ctx.sampling_off}

   1: """ECL B 窶・bank spend/no-spend ast-guard tests (Codex HIGH-4, ﾂｧI4).
   2: 
   3: Issue 003 (``loop/20260708-m13-b-code-impl/issues/003-spend-ast-guard.md``) of
   4: the FROZEN ADR ``.steering/20260707-m13-b-impl-design/design-final.md`` (ﾂｧI4).
   5: Guards ``bank.py`` / ``bank_fixtures.py`` (Issue 001/002) at the AST level:
   6: raw-row-only (no ``math.log`` / ``Counter`` / set-over-zone / ``groupby`` /
   7: ``numpy``/``pandas``/``scipy``/``statistics`` aggregation), a call-cap runtime
   8: helper, no adaptive top-up, annotation-opaque identifiers, and a closed
   9: import allowlist. The guard logic itself lives in ``_bank_spend_guard.py``
  10: (non-test helper, mirrors the ``_measurement_guard.py`` convention) so pytest
  11: never collects it and this module's own self-scan never targets it.
  12: 
  13: Scope guard (ﾂｧI4/ﾂｧI9, binding, mirrors ``test_ecl_bank_driver.py`` /
  14: ``test_ecl_bank_fixtures.py``). This is a *construction* apparatus guard,
  15: **NOT a measurement line**: it computes no ``H(zone|ctx)`` / count /
  16: diversity itself 窶・every test here only asserts such a surface is *absent*
  17: from the modules it scans (:func:`test_bank_annotation_opaque` self-scans
  18: this very module for the same reason).
  19: """
  20: 
  21: from __future__ import annotations
  22: 
  23: import ast
  24: from pathlib import Path
  25: 
  26: import pytest
  27: 
  28: from tests.test_integration._bank_spend_guard import (

  31:     assert_bank_no_measurement_surface,
  32:     assert_llm_call_cap,
  33:     assert_no_adaptive_topup,
  34:     assert_no_aggregation_surface,
  35: )
  36: 
  37: _THIS_FILE = Path(__file__)
  38: _REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
  39: _BANK_SRC = _REPO_ROOT / "src" / "erre_sandbox" / "integration" / "embodied" / "bank.py"
  40: _BANK_FIXTURES_SRC = (
  41:     _REPO_ROOT
  42:     / "src"
  43:     / "erre_sandbox"
  44:     / "integration"
  45:     / "embodied"
  46:     / "bank_fixtures.py"

  48: _BANK_FILES = (_BANK_SRC, _BANK_FIXTURES_SRC)
  49: # The capture CLI (Issue 005) is the annotation *writer* 窶・ﾂｧI4/grill-goals D-6 lists
  50: # ``scripts/ecl_bank_*.py`` in the bank-module scan set, so the aggregation /
  51: # measurement / annotation-opaque guards cover it too. It is intentionally *not*
  52: # under the strict bank-module import-allowlist: a thin CLI legitimately imports
  53: # ``argparse`` / ``sys`` / ``json`` / ``handoff`` that the core modules do not.
  54: _BANK_CAPTURE_SRC = _REPO_ROOT / "scripts" / "ecl_bank_capture.py"
  55: _BANK_AGG_FILES = (*_BANK_FILES, _BANK_CAPTURE_SRC)
  56:

  58: def _parse(path: Path) -> ast.Module:
  59:     return ast.parse(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

  75: def _mock_embedding() -> EmbeddingClient:
  76:     """Constant-vector embedding (Ollama-free)."""
  77:     vec = [0.01] * EmbeddingClient.DEFAULT_DIM
  78: 
  79:     def handler(request: httpx.Request) -> httpx.Response:
  80:         body = json.loads(request.content)
  81:         inputs = body.get("input") or []
  82:         count = len(inputs) if isinstance(inputs, list) else 1
  83:         return httpx.Response(httpx.codes.OK, json={"embeddings": [vec] * count})
  84: 
  85:     return EmbeddingClient(
  86:         client=httpx.AsyncClient(
  87:             base_url=EmbeddingClient.DEFAULT_ENDPOINT,
  88:             transport=httpx.MockTransport(handler),
  89:         )
  90:     )
  91: 
  92: 
  93: @dataclass
  94: class _MockInnerChat:
  95:     """Ollama-free inner chat that re-serves a fixed plan every call."""
  96: 
  97:     content: str = _PLAN_JSON
  98:     calls: list[dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  99: 
 100:     async def chat(
 101:         self,
 102:         messages: Sequence[ChatMessage],
 103:         *,
 104:         sampling: ResolvedSampling,
 105:         model: str | None = None,
 106:         options: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 107:         think: bool | None = None,
 108:     ) -> ChatResponse:
 109:         self.calls.append(
 110:             {
 111:                 "messages": messages,
 112:                 "sampling": sampling,
 113:                 "model": model,
 114:                 "options": options,
 115:                 "think": think,
 116:             }
 117:         )
 118:         return ChatResponse(
 119:             content=self.content,
 120:             model="qwen3:8b",
 121:             eval_count=1,
 122:             total_duration_ms=0.0,
 123:         )
 124: 
 125: 
 126: def _store_factory() -> MemoryStore:
 127:     return MemoryStore(db_path=":memory:")
 128: 
 129: 
 130: async def _run_pass(*, embedding: EmbeddingClient, inner: Any | None = None) -> Any:
 131:     substrate = build_competing_cue_substrate()
 132:     return await run_provenance_pass(
 133:         substrate=substrate,
 134:         inner_chat=inner or _MockInnerChat(),
 135:         store_factory=_store_factory,
 136:         embedding=embedding,
 137:         run_id="bank-i1-test",
 138:         retrieval_now=_FIXED_CLOCK,
 139:         base_ts=_FIXED_CLOCK,
 140:     )

 203:                 )

 213:                 "live organ's canonical builder may"
 214:             )

 230: def test_bank_cue_symmetric() -> None:
 231:     """Each Z_comp zone gets one structurally identical affordance +
 232:     zone_transition cue and one content-mirrored memory (ﾂｧI1.1/ﾂｧI3.1)."""
 233:     substrate = build_competing_cue_substrate()
 234: 
 235:     affordances = [o for o in substrate.observations if o.event_type == "affordance"]
 236:     transitions = [
 237:         o for o in substrate.observations if o.event_type == "zone_transition"
 238:     ]
 239:     assert len(affordances) == len(BANK_Z_COMP)
 240:     assert len(transitions) == len(BANK_Z_COMP)
 241:     assert {a.zone for a in affordances} == set(BANK_Z_COMP)
 242:     assert {t.to_zone for t in transitions} == set(BANK_Z_COMP)
 243:     assert all(t.from_zone == BANK_NEUTRAL_ZONE for t in transitions)
 244:     # Same salience / same distance across every zone 窶・only zone-derived
 245:     # fields (prop_id / zone / to_zone) differ.
 246:     assert len({a.salience for a in affordances}) == 1
 247:     assert len({a.distance for a in affordances}) == 1
 248:     assert len({a.prop_kind for a in affordances}) == 1
 249: 
 250:     assert len(substrate.memories) == len(BANK_Z_COMP)
 251:     assert len({m.strength for m in substrate.memories}) == 1
 252:     assert len({m.cosine_sim for m in substrate.memories}) == 1
 253:     assert len({m.entry.kind for m in substrate.memories}) == 1
 254:     assert len({m.entry.importance for m in substrate.memories}) == 1
 255:     # Content mirrors the zone (distinct per zone, each mentions its own zone).
 256:     assert len({m.entry.content for m in substrate.memories}) == len(BANK_Z_COMP)
 257:     for zone, memory in zip(BANK_Z_COMP, substrate.memories, strict=True):
 258:         assert zone.value in memory.entry.content

 266: async def test_bank_provenance_pass_uses_canonical_builder(
 267:     monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch,
 268: ) -> None:
 269:     """The rendered (system_prompt, user_prompt) are exactly what
 270:     ``cognition.prompting.build_system_prompt`` / ``build_user_prompt`` produced
 271:     *inside* the untouched cycle 窶・proven by spying the organ's own call sites,
 272:     not by re-deriving the prompt independently."""
 273:     orig_system = cognition_cycle.build_system_prompt
 274:     orig_user = cognition_cycle.build_user_prompt
 275:     captured_system: list[str] = []
 276:     captured_user: list[str] = []
 277: 
 278:     def spy_system(persona: Any, agent: Any) -> str:
 279:         result = orig_system(persona, agent)
 280:         captured_system.append(result)
 281:         return result
 282: 
 283:     def spy_user(observations: Any, memories: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> str:
 284:         result = orig_user(observations, memories, **kwargs)
 285:         captured_user.append(result)
 286:         return result
 287: 
 288:     monkeypatch.setattr(cognition_cycle, "build_system_prompt", spy_system)
 289:     monkeypatch.setattr(cognition_cycle, "build_user_prompt", spy_user)
 290: 
 291:     embedding = _mock_embedding()
 292:     try:
 293:         frozen = await _run_pass(embedding=embedding)
 294:     finally:
 295:         await embedding.close()
 296: 
 297:     # One full-cycle pass per condition (T_on, T_off) => two canonical-builder
 298:     # invocations of each, in order.
 299:     assert len(captured_system) == 2
 300:     assert len(captured_user) == 2
 301:     assert frozen.system_prompt == captured_system[0]
 302:     assert frozen.user_prompt == captured_user[0]
 303:

 310: def test_bank_zone_bias_pin_sets_and_restores() -> None:
 311:     """``_pinned_zone_bias_off`` pins ``ERRE_ZONE_BIAS_P=0`` and restores the
 312:     prior value on exit, even when the prior value would have caused a bias
 313:     resample (hostile default simulation)."""
 314:     prior = os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR)
 315:     os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = "1.0"
 316:     try:
 317:         with bank_fixtures._pinned_zone_bias_off():  # sanctioned internal test
 318:             assert os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] == "0"
 319:         assert os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] == "1.0"
 320:     finally:
 321:         if prior is None:
 322:             os.environ.pop(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR, None)
 323:         else:
 324:             os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = prior
 325: 
 326: 
 327: async def test_bank_provenance_bias_off() -> None:
 328:     """A full provenance pass succeeds (no internal ``bias_fired`` assertion
 329:     fires) even when the ambient env var would otherwise enable a 100% bias
 330:     resample 窶・the pin, not persona luck, is what guarantees it."""
 331:     prior = os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR)
 332:     os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = "1.0"
 333:     embedding = _mock_embedding()
 334:     try:
 335:         frozen = await _run_pass(embedding=embedding)
 336:         assert frozen.frozen_ctx_id == "bank-ctx-0"
 337:         # The ambient env var is restored to its hostile value right after the
 338:         # pass (the pin only holds for the pass's own scope).
 339:         assert os.environ.get(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR) == "1.0"
 340:     finally:
 341:         await embedding.close()
 342:         if prior is None:
 343:             os.environ.pop(ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR, None)
 344:         else:
 345:             os.environ[ZONE_BIAS_ENV_VAR] = prior
 346:

 352: 
 353: async def test_bank_frozen_context_prompt_identity() -> None:
 354:     """T_on/T_off render byte-identical prompts; only sampling differs (ﾂｧI3.3:
 355:     ﾎｻ never enters either canonical builder's output)."""
 356:     substrate = build_competing_cue_substrate()
 357:     embedding = _mock_embedding()
 358:     try:
 359:         agent_on = substrate.agent_state.model_copy(
 360:             update={"locomotion": bank_fixtures.LocomotionState(lam=BANK_LAMBDA_CTX[0])}
 361:         )
 362:         agent_off = substrate.agent_state.model_copy(update={"locomotion": None})
 363: 
 364:         result_on = await bank_fixtures._run_condition(
 365:             substrate=substrate,
 366:             agent_state=agent_on,
 367:             inner_chat=_MockInnerChat(),
 368:             store_factory=_store_factory,
 369:             embedding=embedding,
 370:             run_id="bank-i1-g6-on",
 371:             retrieval_now=_FIXED_CLOCK,
 372:             base_ts=_FIXED_CLOCK,
 373:             seed=0,
 374:         )
 375:         result_off = await bank_fixtures._run_condition(
 376:             substrate=substrate,
 377:             agent_state=agent_off,
 378:             inner_chat=_MockInnerChat(),
 379:             store_factory=_store_factory,
 380:             embedding=embedding,
 381:             run_id="bank-i1-g6-off",
 382:             retrieval_now=_FIXED_CLOCK,
 383:             base_ts=_FIXED_CLOCK,
 384:             seed=0,
 385:         )
 386: 
 387:         assert (
 388:             result_on.decisions[0].call.system_prompt
 389:             == result_off.decisions[0].call.system_prompt
 390:         )
 391:         assert (
 392:             result_on.decisions[0].call.user_prompt
 393:             == result_off.decisions[0].call.user_prompt
 394:         )
 395:         # sampling differs between the two conditions (the whole point of the
 396:         # locomotion channel modulating something).
 397:         assert (
 398:             result_on.decisions[0].call.sampling
 399:             != result_off.decisions[0].call.sampling
 400:         )
 401: 
 402:         frozen = await _run_pass(embedding=embedding)
 403:         assert frozen.system_prompt == result_on.decisions[0].call.system_prompt
 404:         assert frozen.user_prompt == result_on.decisions[0].call.user_prompt
 405:         assert frozen.sampling_on == result_on.decisions[0].call.sampling
 406:         assert frozen.sampling_off == result_off.decisions[0].call.sampling
 407:         assert frozen.sampling_on != frozen.sampling_off
 408:     finally:
 409:         await embedding.close()
 410:
